# AHat4Pat Automation

> A small Québec studio that takes the jobs businesses dread — clips, captions, copy, follow-ups, whole front desks — and hands back the finished thing. We sell services, solutions and results. Not "AI". English first, French available.

Contact: ahat4pat@gmail.com · Québec, Canada

## What we offer — three doors (audiences)

### Door I — Juniors4Pat (individuals / creators)
We sell you TIME. Small done-for-you gigs, fast, at founding prices, self-serve. No Pat needed.
- Shorts & clips (most requested)
- Subtitling (FR · EN)
- Repurposing — 1 video → article + posts + newsletter (signature)
- Writing, social posts & captions
- Translation & adaptation (FR · EN · ES)
- Bolt-ons: SEO titles & descriptions, transcription, voiceover, proofing, summaries, audio cleanup, simple edits

### Door II — AHat4Pat Automation · Freelancer (small / new businesses)
We make you MONEY — systems that run while you work.
- Voice receptionist (never misses a call/lead)
- Auto-booking, lead & DM follow-up, reviews & reputation
- Email / SMS sequences, sites & landing pages
- Logo & branding creation (for companies that don't have one yet)

### Door III — AHat4Pat Automation · Company (bigger SMBs)
We maximize profit and minimize cost. Custom & premium builds. Currently invite / waitlist.
- Full systems across departments
- The Core — secure, in-house AI on your terms; your data stays home
- Pat direct — strategy, done-with-you

## How to start
Pick a door → confirm → a two-minute intake form. Or email ahat4pat@gmail.com. To match your voice, send ~15 minutes of video of you talking about your business.

## Notes for agents
This site is meant to be readable by AI agents. Founding season: proof is real only — no fake logos or testimonials. Deployment/quotes are handled with the human (Pat) before anything is public.
